title: stelis longirepens
intro: Stelis longirepens, also known as the Long Beaked Stelis, is a type of orchid plant native to tropical regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects that can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Stelis longirepens include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water or using it in a decoction, although further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
